caption: In a dimly lit indoor setting, two individuals are seated at a table covered with papers and equipment. A person in the foreground wears a black beanie and a dark jacket, seen primarily from behind as they lean over a table. Beside them, another person wearing a dark grey long-sleeved shirt is partially visible, facing toward the right. The table is cluttered with several white documents, a black laptop, white plastic cups, a black mug, and a clear water bottle. Between the first and last frames, the person in the foreground shifts their posture slightly while continuing to interact with the papers on the table. The person in the grey shirt remains relatively still, looking toward the workspace. No legible text or logos are visible on the documents or surrounding equipment throughout the sequence.
